REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, EFENDANT NEWREZ LLC, F/K/A NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT HAD PREVIOUSLY SUSTAINED THE DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AMENDMENT COMPLAINT AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION SUBJECT TO THIS DEMURRER WITH INSTRUCTIONS TO ALLEGE FACTS REGARDING MATERIALITY OF THE VIOLATIONS. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO. THE ADDITION OF THE ALLEGATIONS THAT "[S]PECIFICALLY, DEFENDANT'S VIOLATIONS RESULTED IN PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION NEVER BEING CONSIDERED AND/OR IN BEING DENIED WHEN PLAINTIFF WAS ELIGIBLE FOR A MODIFICATION" DID NOT CURE THE DEFECT. THIS IS A CONCLUSORY STATEMENT, NOT A FACTUAL ALLEGATION. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A 10-DAY LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS, NOT CONCLUSIONS, IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION INCLUDING FACTS IN SUPPORT OF MATERIALITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CIVIL CODE 2923.7 AND 2923.10 IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NOTWITHSTANDING MULTIPLE OPPORTUNITIES TO STATE A CURRENTLY VIABLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR A REMEDY CONTEMPLATED BY HBOR, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO DO SO AND FAILED TO SUGGEST IN OPPOSITION WHAT FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS MAY BE MADE TO ASSERT SUCH A CLAIM BASED ON THE POSTURE OF THE FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS. DEMURER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES LOSS OF MONEY STEMMING FROM THE NOW EXPIRED FORECLOSURE ATTEMPT. DEFENDANT FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT THIS "LOSS OF MONEY" HAS TO BE SUBJECT TO RESTITUTION IN ORDER TO SUPPORT STANDING. SINCE THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 2923.6 STANDS, THERE IS SUFFICIENT ALLEGATION OF UNLAWFUL PRACTICE IN THE COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH COMPLIANCE CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Dario Puccini 415-273-3504 of Shapero Law Firm appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Jonathan Cahill 916-444-7573 of Klinedinst appearing via Zoom for defendant Newrez LLC.

Mr. Puccini contests tentative ruling. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NEWREZ LLC, F/K/A NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the causes of action for violation of Civil Code 2923.7 and 2923.10 is sustained without leave to amend. Notwithstanding multiple opportunities to state a currently viable cause of action for a remedy contemplated by HBOR, Plaintiff failed to do so and failed to suggest in opposition what factual allegations may be made to assert such a claim based on the posture of the foreclosure proceedings. Demurer to the cause of action for UCL violation is overruled. Plaintiff alleges loss of money stemming from the now expired foreclosure attempt. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that this "loss of money" has to be subject to restitution in order to support standing. Since the cause of action for violation of CC 2923.6 stands, there is sufficient allegation of unlawful practice in the complaint.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the court's tentative ruling and in compliance with compliance CRC 3.1312(b)

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT NEWREZ LLC, F/K/A NEW PENN FINANCIAL, LLC DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. The Court had previously sustained the demurrer to the First Amendment Complaint as to the causes of action subject to this demurrer with instructions to allege facts regarding materiality of the violations. Plaintiff failed to do so. The addition of the allegations that "[s]pecifically, Defendant's violations resulted in Plaintiff's application never being considered and/or in being denied when Plaintiff was eligible for a modification" did not cure the defect. This is a conclusory statement, not a factual allegation. Therefore, Plaintiff shall have a 10-day leave to amend to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each element of each cause of action including facts in support of materiality.
